thesis: Optical-fibre / digital-networking capex up-cycle (5G/fiber/data-centre build-out) is driving both an exceptional momentum surge and strongly rising revisions; a core Digital India infrastructure holding.
falsification: Price momentum reverses sharply (z_mom collapses toward zero) and revisions turn from rising to falling over the next 1-2 prints, signalling a blow-off rather than a durable up-cycle.

thesis: Digital infrastructure and IT-services demand is lifting earnings expectations; momentum and rising revisions agree, a clean Digital India add.
falsification: Momentum fades below peers and revisions stop rising, removing the dual-signal support.

thesis: Rides the same digital-networking/telecom-gear capex cycle as STLTECH; strong momentum, but no analyst-revision read so I keep it a satellite, not a core.
falsification: Price momentum rolls over; without a revision signal to lean on, weak price alone refutes the position.

thesis: Structural growth in Indian market participation and derivatives volumes lifts a digital exchange platform; momentum and rising revisions both support.
falsification: Volumes/expectations roll over (revisions fall) or a regulatory shock hits exchange economics, breaking the structural growth case.

thesis: Dominant digital commodity-exchange franchise with strong momentum and rising revisions; keep as a core position but de-concentrate.
falsification: Momentum reverses and revisions fall, or a regulatory/competitive shock erodes exchange economics.

thesis: Structural retail-broking digitisation; momentum and rising revisions support a core fintech-platform weight.
falsification: Retail-activity slowdown or regulatory tightening drives momentum negative and revisions down.

thesis: Digital-broking platform scaling with the retail-participation structural trend; rising revisions back the thesis.
falsification: Revisions fall and momentum turns negative as retail flows or platform economics weaken.

thesis: Structural online insurance/credit-distribution platform; revisions still modestly supportive, so hold smaller while momentum is flat.
falsification: Momentum stays flat-to-negative and revisions roll over, confirming the flat price is not just a pause.

thesis: Banking/financial-software franchise benefiting from digital-banking spend; rising revisions and positive momentum align.
falsification: Revisions turn down and momentum fades, signalling the software-spend tailwind is stalling.

thesis: Domestic AI/high-performance-compute and data-centre build-out lifts a home-grown server/infra maker; rising revisions support.
falsification: AI/data-centre order momentum stalls, revisions fall, and price momentum turns negative.

thesis: Omni-channel digital retail platform scaling profitably; strongly rising revisions are the lead signal, momentum constructive.
falsification: Revisions stop rising and momentum turns negative, indicating the growth/margin story is being marked down.

thesis: Real-money/casual gaming and digital-media platform with strongly rising revisions; a genuine digital-platform exposure.
falsification: Regulatory action on gaming or a revision roll-over breaks the thesis; momentum turning negative would confirm.

thesis: Travel-technology SaaS with rising revisions; flat price keeps it a held, not added, until momentum confirms.
falsification: Revisions fall or momentum turns clearly negative, showing the SaaS demand read was wrong.

thesis: IT-services price has rolled over but Coforge's strongly rising revisions are a forward tell of a demand turn; keep as core digital-services exposure, trimmed.
falsification: Next revision print turns down while price momentum stays negative, confirming the de-rating is fundamental not technical.

thesis: Rising revisions against weak price suggest the IT-services sell-off is overshooting; hold smaller pending a momentum turn.
falsification: Revisions roll over and price momentum stays negative.

thesis: Large-cap IT bellwether with still-rising revisions; a defensive theme anchor while the sector momentum is weak.
falsification: Revisions fall and price momentum stays negative, signalling a deeper IT-spend downturn.

thesis: Margin/turnaround story with rising revisions; hold as theme exposure but smaller until momentum confirms.
falsification: Revisions turn down or the margin recovery stalls while price stays weak.

thesis: Keep a small bellwether IT weight for theme completeness, but the weak momentum and soft revisions justify a much-reduced size.
falsification: Revisions deteriorate further while price momentum stays negative — would trigger a full exit next round.

thesis: Reduced IT-services exposure retained for theme; weak momentum and neutral revisions keep it a small satellite.
falsification: Revisions fall below neutral while price stays weak.

thesis: Digital-engineering name kept only as a small residual; the signal no longer justifies a meaningful weight.
falsification: Continued falling revisions confirm the de-rating — full exit follows.

thesis: Domestic digital-surveillance hardware demand (smart cities, security) drives momentum and rising revisions; a genuine Digital India hardware play.
falsification: Momentum reverses and revisions fall, indicating the order pipeline is softening.

thesis: Defense-electronics and digital-communications hardware with rising revisions; on-theme digital-hardware exposure, sized as a satellite.
falsification: Order momentum stalls, revisions fall, and price momentum turns negative.

thesis: EMS scaling on the India electronics-manufacturing push; modest revisions support a small position.
falsification: Margin/order softness drives revisions down and momentum negative.

thesis: Electronics-manufacturing supply-chain beneficiary with momentum and rising revisions; satellite digital-hardware weight.
falsification: Momentum reverses and revisions fall as the EMS order cycle cools.

thesis: Core digital-consumer platform kept small; weak momentum and soft revisions argue against a full weight for now.
falsification: Revisions keep falling and momentum stays negative, indicating competitive/margin pressure — exit follows.

thesis: Defensive telecom-digital anchor on tariff-led ARPU growth; weak near-term signals justify only a small weight.
falsification: Both momentum and revisions deteriorate further, removing the defensive rationale.

thesis: Digital-first beauty/personal-care platform with strongly rising revisions and constructive momentum; a small digital-consumer add.
falsification: Revisions roll over or momentum turns negative as the brand-portfolio story is marked down.

thesis: Precision engineering for clean-energy/defense/space with very strong momentum and rising revisions; taken in small size as a near-theme high-conviction signal, deliberately capped to avoid theme drift.
falsification: Momentum reverses sharply and revisions fall, confirming the surge was a crowded move rather than a durable order cycle.
